name: swap_quote
description: Get optimal swap route with price impact analysis on Base chain. Returns best route, expected output, price impact percentage, and gas estimate for any ERC-20 token pair.

tokenIn.description: Token to sell — symbol (USDC, WETH, ETH) or 0x address

tokenOut.description: Token to buy — symbol or 0x address

amountIn.description: Amount to sell in human-readable units (e.g. '10.5')
